title: Enable the google-workspace skill by creating a symlink to activate
job:
Enable the google-workspace skill by creating a symlink to activate it.

Files to modify:
- Create symlink: `ln -s ../google-workspace skills/active/google-workspace`

The skill is already configured with domain-wide delegation credentials at `/Users/yasmineseidu/coding/google.json` pointing to user `yasmine@smarterflo.com`, so no additional credential setup is needed.

After creating the symlink, verify it's active by checking that `google-workspace` appears in the skills/active directory and can be used via commands like `npx google-workspace --help`.
